description: arXiv:2607.16514v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Image-based dietary assessment promises to replace costly, bias-prone manual recalls, but portion estimation remains a major blocker. Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) recognize a wide range of foods zero-shot in uncontrolled photos, yet they are weak at portion estimation -- a gap we measure across the current frontier (Gemini, GPT, and Claude flagships...
author: Lin Liao, Peng Li
